n_greet.speaker: Vesna
n_greet.text: Another one. Fresh off the truck and already tucked into the robe. They work fast, don't they.

n_who.speaker: Vesna
n_who.text: Vesna. Welcome to the most spiritual place you'll ever need an exit plan for.

n_warn.speaker: Vesna
n_warn.text: Relax. They love me. Haven't worked out why yet — that's the fun part. Now get in line before Coll notices you've got a mouth.
